raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/year> : We were fraudulently charged {$7400.00}. 
Within an hour we called Citibank, to report the fraud. 
Citibank told us it couldn't initiate an investigation until the charge posted, and we should contact it again then. 
XX/XX/year> : The fraudulent charge posted ; Citibank paid it, knowing we'd reported it as fraud. 
XX/XX/year> : We contacted Citibank to be sure it had opened an investigation. 
XX/XX/year> : We received an email from Citibank claiming that " The documentation or facts provided do not support the billing error dispute claim. '' It never requested any documentation from us, although we contacted it on XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX. The bank claims we're responsible for the {$7400.00}. 

It erroneously paid a charge it knew was fraudulent and is now trying to recoup its loss from us, by classifying " fraud '' as a " billing dispute '' with a vendor.
